ProfileInfo.title: ProfileInfo
ProfileInfo.description: User profile info and configuration, including active visual theme preferences.

name.description: Human readable name of the user.

email.description: User's email registered via Firebase Authentication.

theme.description: Visual theme configuration preference for UI rendering.

Area.title: Area
Area.description: Subjects, projects, skills, or hobbies tracked by the user.

name.description: Clean literal name of the focus Area.

createdAt.description: Standard timestamp when Area was initialized.

Session.title: Session
Session.description: A single logged focus timer interval.

areaId.description: Reference identifier to the tracked Area.

areaName.description: Cached name of the Area to prevent heavy client-side joining.

areaColor.description: Cached style color of the Area.

startTime.description: Start timestamp of the focus session.

endTime.description: End timestamp of the focus session.

note.description: Optional client note reflecting on the session.

date.description: Local date string representation in YYYY-MM-DD for simpler timeline queries.

Goal.title: Goal
Goal.description: An target time objective representing an area's weekly commitment.

areaId.description: Reference identifier of the targeted Area.

weeklyTarget.description: Time objective in minutes per week.

users/{uid}/profile/info.description: Single profile document tracking core user preferences.

users/{uid}/areas/{areaId}.description: User created categories/subjects for logging sessions.
